sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12383" key="a)po/guon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόγυον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mooring cable,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.93</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.); cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπίγυον, ἀπόγειος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
